---
title: "EDA — Don River Streamflow"
author: "Dylan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

## 1. Load Data

your code chunk here

## 2. Data Quality Checks

your code chunk here

## 3. Time Series

your code chunk here

## 4. Distribution

your code chunk here

## 5. Seasonality

your code chunk here

## 6. Key Findings

written summary here
```

---

## How To Connect To GitHub

This is a one time setup then it's automatic.

---

### Option 1: Through RStudio (Easiest)
```
1. In RStudio: Tools → Version Control → Project Setup
2. Select Git
3. Restart RStudio
4. You'll see a Git tab in the top right pane
```
